activities_projects.title: Relief Map Analysis
steps: Study the relief map carefully
Identify major mountain ranges, plateaus, and plains
Explain their significance in shaping India’s geography

activities_projects.title: Himalayan Formation Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the geological formation of the Himalayas
steps: Research the formation of fold mountains
Explain how the Himalayas were formed
Write a short report on their geological features

activities_projects.title: River Deposition Project
activities_projects.objective: Understand deposition processes in the Northern Plains
steps: Study how rivers deposit alluvium
Explain the formation of riverine islands and deltas
Provide examples from Indian rivers

activities_projects.title: Plateau Mineral Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the importance of the Peninsular Plateau
steps: Identify major minerals found in the plateau region
Explain how plateau resources support industries
Write a short report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic importance of plateaus

activities_projects.title: Ghats and Climate Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the climatic role of Western Ghats
steps: Study monsoon wind directions
Explain how Western Ghats cause orographic rainfall
Give examples of affected regions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between landforms and climate

activities_projects.title: Desert Ecosystem Study
steps: Research vegetation and climate of the Thar Desert
Write about human adaptations to desert conditions
Explain desert landforms

activities_projects.title: Coastal Development Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand economic importance of coastal plains
steps: Identify major ports on the coasts
Explain how coastal plains help fishing and trade
Write a short analysis
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the economic role of coastal areas

activities_projects.title: Island Strategic Importance Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the strategic importance of island groups
steps: Study the location of Andaman & Nicobar Islands
Explain their strategic importance for India
Write a short report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand geopolitical importance of islands

activities_projects.title: Physiographic Interdependence Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand how different landforms support each other
steps: Explain how mountains, plains, plateaus, deserts, and coasts interact
Give examples of resources provided by each region

activities_projects.title: Geographical Presentation
activities_projects.objective: Develop presentation skills on physical features
steps: Prepare a chart explaining India's physical divisions
Include diagrams and maps
Present it in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop presentation and research skills
